conditional: RB Leipzig want to keep him for another season, but the player prefers to leave immediately.
headline: Liverpool prepare new bid for Yan Diomandé after €100m rejection
body: Liverpool are preparing a new offer for Yan Diomandé after RB Leipzig rejected their initial €100m bid, with the player keen to leave despite his club's desire to keep him.
text:
🚨 Liverpool are prepared to bid again for Yan Diomandé after opening €100m proposal got rejected.
RB Leipzig insist to keep Diomandé for one more season, player prefers to leave now.
🎥 piped.video/K4Z8GebXIXo?is=i5Ck…

REPORTED | Liverpool prepare new bid for Yan Diomandé after €100m rejection
